creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text: Yup- I should have mentioned, if you do or are willing to build your own qemu-user-static port, I have a patch available here that updates it to a version that implements most of the latest syscalls and seemingly fixes issues with multi-threaded stuff: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D24655 -> It doesn't fix the aforementioned signal regression, but it's generally stable.
